name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: From my family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,

Whether you're traveling or staying at home, Tom, Ben, Meg and I wanted to wish you and your loved ones a warm and safe holiday season.

We hope that you can enjoy some time with people close to you as 2017 draws to a close, and we wish you very a happy new year.

With every good wish,

The Hassan Family

Contribute - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20171224_HolidayCard17_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States
clean_body: Hello, Whether you're traveling or staying at home, Tom, Ben, Meg and I wanted to wish you and your loved ones a warm and safe holiday season. We hope that you can enjoy some time with people close to you as 2017 draws to a close, and we wish you very a happy new year. With every good wish, The Hassan Family Contribute - --

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3200/9e00690/4040c89b/2403c19c/3747358570/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")
Hello --

As 2017 draws to a close, I want to take another opportunity to thank you for everything you've helped achieve this year.

We have challenges coming at us in 2018, but I'm excited to see what we can accomplish working together next year. And, while we may not all have the same beliefs, look similar, or celebrate in the same ways, I'm happy to be surrounded by supporters like you who embrace the positive change we can make together.

I hope you have time to enjoy the final days of this year with your family and friends, too.

Happy Holidays,

Andrew

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3200/9e00690/4040c89b/2403c19c/3747358570/VEsE/ "https://andrewgillum.com/")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3200/9e00690/4040c89b/2403c19f/3747358570/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3200/9e00690/4040c89b/2403c19e/3747358570/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3200/9e00690/4040c89b/2403c191/3747358570/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: One more time -- thank you, Derek
body:
2018 will be a big year for this team. |
---
[](https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/m/c0879ac/45580a18/4efb0baf/57a51c50/490424186/VEsH/ "https://www.onwardtogether.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=onward&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=holiday&source=holiday")

| | Before 2017 ends, I want to say thank you, Derek.

We knew this year would be a difficult one. But it was also full of fierce passion and hope -- from the millions of people who took to the streets on behalf of the values we share to the activists, newcomers and veterans alike, who lead us to victories in Virginia, Alabama, and across the country. We really have seen that we are stronger together (sorry, couldn't resist).

My wish for you is that you're able to take a break this holiday season and spend some time with the people you love. Bill and I will be celebrating the best way we know how: by sharing our favorite traditions with the youngest members of our family.

2018 will be a big year for this team. I hope you enjoy your holidays -- and come back refreshed and ready to win. I know I will.

Onward!

Hillary

|
---|---|---

|
---

You're receiving this email because you're a member of a team of big-hearted people who are committed to building a fairer, more inclusive America. If you'd like to learn more about Onward Together, you can do so [here](https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/m/c0879ac/45580a18/4efb0baf/57a51c53/490424186/VEsE/ "https://www.onwardtogether.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=onward&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=holiday&source=holiday"). If you'd like to opt out of receiving more messages like this one, you can do so [here](https://secure.onwardtogether.org/page/m/c0879ac/45580a18/4efb0baf/57a51c52/490424186/VEsF/ "https://secure.onwardtogether.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=onward&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=holiday&source=holiday"). Know someone who should join this team? Forward them this email!

We really have seen that we are stronger together (sorry, couldn't resist). My wish for you is that you're able to take a break this holiday season and spend some time with the people you love. Bill and I will be celebrating the best way we know how: by sharing our favorite traditions with the youngest members of our family. 2018 will be a big year for this team. I hope you enjoy your holidays -- and come back refreshed and ready to win. I know I will. Onward!
